PRACTICE.MOVE_SLIDER: Move the slider for any emotions you're experiencing.
PRACTICE.Q3: 3. Where is it in the body?
PRACTICE.IMAGINE: Imagine a cleansing emotional shower washing over you, letting the feelings flow out and away.
PRACTICE.RELEASED: Your emotions have been safely released
PRACTICE.ERROR_ALERT: There was a problem releasing your practice. Please try again.

DASHBOARD.WELCOME: Welcome to your safe space for emotional check-ins.

PROMPTS.P1: Name one sound you can hear right now, and just listen to it for 10 seconds.
PROMPTS.P2: Notice the feeling of your feet resting on the floor. You are supported.
PROMPTS.P3: Take a deep, slow breath in... and let it out with a sigh.
PROMPTS.P4: Find one object near you that has a pleasant texture. Notice how it feels.
PROMPTS.P5: Look around and find three things that are colored green. Let your eyes rest on them.
PROMPTS.P6: Roll your shoulders back and down. Release the tension you didn't know you were holding.
PROMPTS.P7: What is one incredibly small thing that brought you a tiny moment of peace today?
PROMPTS.P8: Think of a warm drink or a favorite food. Imagine the comforting feeling it brings.
PROMPTS.P9: Who is someone that makes you feel safe just by existing?
PROMPTS.P10: What is one thing your body allowed you to do today, even if it was just breathing?
PROMPTS.P11: Recall a moment today when the sun felt nice on your skin or the air felt fresh.
PROMPTS.P12: What is one gentle, kind thing you can do for yourself in the next hour?
PROMPTS.P13: Speak to yourself right now as you would speak to a friend who is feeling overwhelmed.
PROMPTS.P14: It is okay if all you did today was survive. That is enough.
PROMPTS.P15: Give yourself permission to pause. You don't have to figure everything out right this second.
PROMPTS.P16: Acknowledge one hard thing you are carrying, and remind yourself that you are doing your best.
PROMPTS.P17: If your current mood was a weather pattern, what would it be? Just observe it, no need to change it.
PROMPTS.P18: What is a thought that you can choose to put down and leave for tomorrow?
PROMPTS.P19: Imagine washing away today's stress. What does the water feel like?
PROMPTS.P20: What is one word you would like to guide the rest of your day?
PROMPTS.P21: Unclench your jaw. Drop your shoulders. Breathe.
PROMPTS.P22: You are allowed to take up space and feel exactly what you are feeling.
PROMPTS.P23: Think of a place where you felt completely relaxed. Spend a moment there in your mind.
PROMPTS.P24: Notice the temperature of the air on your skin.
PROMPTS.P25: Place your hand on your chest and feel the steady rhythm of your heartbeat.
PROMPTS.P26: What is one boundary you can set today to protect your peace?
PROMPTS.P27: Celebrate a tiny victory from today, no matter how small.
PROMPTS.P28: Close your eyes for just 5 seconds and embrace the darkness.
PROMPTS.P29: Remind yourself: Feelings are visitors. Let them come and let them go.
PROMPTS.P30: You are right here, in this exact moment, and you are okay.
